frame_analyses.description: Gauze positioned with striped pattern visible, blue endoloop visible in field, instruments approaching
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup appears standard with gauze suspended between clamps

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Scissors positioned perpendicular to gauze surface

frame_analyses.description: Scissors progressing around circular pattern, grasper stabilizing gauze
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good coordination between scissors and grasper for tissue stabilization

Scissors working on curved portion of pattern, gauze remains attached to clamps
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining consistent distance from marked line

frame_analyses.description: Final cuts being made to complete circular pattern
Pattern cut appears complete, circular piece separated from surrounding gauze
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean separation achieved, gauze remains attached to clamps

penalties.description: Minor deviation from marked line visible at several points around the circle

confidence_rationale: Camera angle makes precise measurement of deviation from marked line difficult. Completion time and overall technique clearly visible. Penalty estimation conservative based on visible deviations.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter measurements at all 8 cardinal points due to camera angle and resolution
Precise location of marked line in some frames due to lighting and gauze texture
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with excellent completion time of 72 seconds. Smooth cutting progression with good instrument coordination. Minor deviations from marked line consistent with intermediate precision level.
strengths: Excellent completion time well within expert range (60-90s)
improvement_suggestions: Focus on closer adherence to marked line, particularly at southwest quadrant
Consider slower progression in areas of maximum curvature to improve precision
